title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 109.030 - Penalties for failure to deliver records
text:
109.030.  Penalties for failure to deliver records. — 1.  If any such officer, or the executor or administrator of such officer, shall fail to deliver such records, books or papers, he or they shall forfeit not more than one thousand nor less than one hundred dollars, to be recovered by civil action to the use of the county.
  2.  Such officer, or the executor or administrator of such officer, shall pay to any person injured by the detention of such records, books or papers all damages which may accrue to him, to be recovered by civil action.
(RSMo 1939 §§ 3624, 3625) 
Prior revisions: 1929 §§ 3234, 3235; 1919 §§ 10596, 10597; 1909 §§ 10407, 10408
